title: fix(core): add AI gateway tool support

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix(core): add AI gateway tool support

summary: Adds support for AI Gateway tools (e.g. gateway.tools.perplexitySearch()) in Mastra's agentic loop. This supersedes the external contribution #13192 (by daavidrgz) with a maintainer-driven version. Key changes: (1) merges streamed provider tool-result chunks back onto matching tool calls in llm-execution-step, (2) infers providerExecuted flag for provider-defined tools when the stream omits it, (3) resolves provider tools by model-facing name in tool-call-step, (4) adds isProviderTool alias and getProviderToolName utility to toolchecks. Includes new unit tests for provider-tool-utils, toolchecks, and regression tests for the gateway streaming and tool-call-step paths.
maintainerNotes: Well-structured PR from a maintainer (write access) that supersedes external PR #13192. All 11 changed files are in packages/core, focused on the agentic loop and tool infrastructure. Build, lint, and all relevant CI checks pass. The 'Full Test Suite' and 'Observability Package Tests' failures are pre-existing (same failures on recently merged PRs like #14086). CodeRabbit left minor nitpicks (edge case for getProviderToolName with no dot, test fixture key naming) but no blocking issues. The PR has a changeset, good description, and solid test coverage (3 new test files, expanded existing tests). Needs a human maintainer approval to merge.
